name: Orange Salmon Steaks
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the salmon steaks with salt and pepper.
2. Blend the juice of half an orange with butter.
3. Cut the remaining half of the orange into thin slices.
4. Brush the steaks with half of the orange-butter mixture.
5. Place them on a greased grill, 3-4 inches from the heat.
6. Cook for 5 minutes, or until the steak is brown.
7. Turn the steaks and brush with the remaining orange-butter mixture.
8. Broil for an additional 5 minutes, or until the fish flakes easily when tested with a fork.
9. Garnish with orange slices.
Serves 6.
